Index.title: Math Learning Studio
Index.description: Past-Exam Video Explainer Learning System MVP

hero.title: Past-exam explainer videos, organized and searchable.
hero.description: Search by school, year, semester, exam type, and problem number. Watch 600+ explainer videos approved by your teachers.

features.title: Everything you need to master past exams.
features.description: Search, watch, and learn from 600+ past-exam explainer videos organized by school, year, semester, and problem number.

feature1.title: Smart search
feature1.desc: Filter by school name, year, semester, exam type, grade, subject, and problem number to find exactly what you need.

feature2.title: Approval-based access
feature2.desc: Teachers approve student accounts to ensure secure, authorized access to all video content.

feature3.title: Mobile-first playback
feature3.desc: Watch explainer videos on any device—tablet, mobile, or desktop. Optimized for touch and portrait viewing.

box2.title: Track exam set completion.
box2.desc: Monitor which exam sets are fully registered, partially complete, or pending upload.

box3.title: Organized by School
box3.desc: Videos are structured by school name, year, semester, exam type, and problem number for easy lookup.

steps.title: Start watching explainer videos in three simple steps.

step1.title: Sign up for access
step1.desc: Create your account with your name, branch, school, and grade. Your teacher will review and approve your request.

step2.title: Search for videos
step2.desc: Filter by school name, year, semester, exam type, and problem number to find the exact explainer you need.

step3.title: Watch and learn
step3.desc: Play videos instantly in your browser on any device. Ask your teacher follow-up questions if needed.

mission.title: Replace manual video delivery with smart search
mission.desc: Teachers no longer send videos via KakaoTalk. Students find and watch explainer videos on their own. Organized, searchable, and secure.

school1.name: Mangpo High School
school1.desc: 2025 1st & 2nd semester midterm and final exam explainers.

school2.name: Suwon High School
school2.desc: Complete coverage of 2024-2025 past exams with detailed solutions.

school3.name: All Schools
school3.desc: Browse explainer videos from 25+ schools across all regions.

cta.title: Ready to access past-exam explainers?
cta.desc: Sign up, get approved by your teacher, and start watching explainer videos organized by school, year, and problem number.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to MLS (Math Learning Studio). By using our platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using MLS, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

use.title: Permitted Use
use.content: You may use MLS for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use the platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose, including but not limited to copyright infringement, harassment, or distribution of malicious content.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All content on MLS, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, videos, and software, is the property of MLS or its content suppliers and is protected by intellectual property laws.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the platform will immediately cease.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, MLS shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the platform.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the platform after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our support channels.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This Privacy Policy explains how MLS collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our platform.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, school, grade, and other account details. We also collect information about your use of the platform, including video views and search history.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, ensure account security, and analyze usage patterns to enhance the platform.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with your teachers and school administrators for educational purposes, and with service providers who assist in operating our platform.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of certain data collection and communications.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. You can control cookie settings through your browser.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on our platform.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our support channels.
